info.name: Javed Momand Liquidation Auction Platform API
info.description:
# Jmomand API - Postman Collection

Complete API collection for the Javed Momand Liquidation Auction Platform.

## Getting Started

1. **Set Environment Variables** - Update `base_url` to your server (default: `http://localhost:5000`)
2. **Authenticate** - Use the Login endpoint, then set the returned `accessToken` to the `auth_token` variable
3. **Entity IDs** - As you create resources, set the corresponding variables (`product_id`, `auction_id`, etc.)

## Authentication

- Most endpoints require a **Bearer JWT token** sent via `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header
- The `auth_token` collection variable is auto-injected into all protected requests
- Admin endpoints require an admin account to be logged in

## Flow (Recommended Order)

1. **Auth** - Login/Register ŌåÆ set `auth_token`
2. **Users** - Register, verify email, manage profile
3. **Category** - Create/get categories (needed for products)
4. **Products** - Create inventory products with images
5. **Auctions** - Schedule auctions for products, list, bid, close
6. **Payments** - Setup Stripe saved-card payment methods
7. **Invoices** - View invoices after auction wins
8. **Pickups** - Schedule and complete pickups
9. **Reports** - View analytics (admin)
10. **Settings** - Configure platform rules (admin)

## Response Format

All API responses follow this structure:

```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Action completed successfully",
  "statusCode": 200,
  "data": { ... },
  "meta": {
    "page": 1,
    "limit": 10,
    "total": 100,
    "totalPage": 10
  },
  "_links": {
    "relatedAction": "/api/v1/path"
  }
}
```

item.name: ­¤ÅĘ’ĖÅ Auth
item.description: Authentication, token refresh, OTP, and password management APIs.

request.description:
Authenticate with email and password to receive JWT access and refresh tokens.

**Response includes:** `accessToken`, `refreshToken` (cookie), and `user` object.

The access token is automatically saved to `auth_token` collection variable on success.
Refresh the access token using the refresh token stored in the HTTP-only cookie.
Request a password reset OTP code sent to the registered email address.
Resend the forgot-password OTP code. Requires authentication (user must be logged in).
Verify the OTP code received during forgot-password flow.
Set a new password after successful OTP verification.
Change password for the currently authenticated user. Requires both current and new passwords.

item.name: ­¤æż Users
item.description: Customer registration, profile management, email verification, and admin user management APIs.

request.description:
Register a new customer account. Also accessible at `POST /api/v1/users/`.

**Note:** After registration, verify email using the email-verifications endpoint.

Verify your email address using the OTP code sent after registration.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/users/verify-email`

Resend the email verification OTP code.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/users/resend-otp`

Admin-only: List all registered users.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/users/all-users`

Get the profile of the currently authenticated user.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/users/my-profile`

Update profile fields and optionally upload a profile image (multipart/form-data).

**Alias:** `PUT /api/v1/users/update-profile`

Get the primary admin user ID.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/users/admin_id`
Admin-only: Get details of a specific user by ID.

Admin-only: Toggle the suspension status of a user.

**Alias:** `PUT /api/v1/users/suspend/{{user_id}}`

Admin-only: Toggle the block status of a user.

**Alias:** `PUT /api/v1/users/block/{{user_id}}`
Create a new product category with optional image.
Get all product categories (public).
Get a single category by its ID.
Update a category name and/or image.
Toggle the deleted/active status of a category.

item.name: ­¤ō” Products
item.description: Inventory product, media upload, detail, update, delete, and monitoring APIs.

formdata.description: Options: new, open_box, like_new, used, damaged, for_parts

request.description:
Admin-only: Create a new inventory product with Cloudinary image uploads (multipart/form-data).

**Required fields:** `title`, `description`, `category`, `condition`, `reservePrice`, `images`

List products with optional search, filter, and pagination.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/products/all`
Admin-only: Inventory monitoring dashboard with auction, payment, winner, and pickup state.
Get detailed information about a specific product.

Admin-only: Update product details and optionally replace images.

**Alias:** `PUT /api/v1/products/update/{{product_id}}`
Admin-only: Delete an inactive product and its Cloudinary images.

item.name: ­¤ö© Auctions
item.description: Auction scheduling, listing, bidding, closing, and bid history APIs.

request.description: Admin-only: Schedule an auction for a product.

query.description: Filter by status (active, upcoming, closed, etc.)

request.description:
List all auctions with optional status filter and pagination.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/auctions/all`

Admin-only: Manually process due auction activations and closures.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/auctions/close-due`
Get detailed information about a specific auction, including current bid status.
Admin-only: List all bids placed on a specific auction.

Place a bid on an active auction. User must have a saved Stripe card as default payment method.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/auctions/{{auction_id}}/bid`
Admin-only: Force-close an auction, validate reserve price, and auto-charge the winning bidder's saved card.

item.name: ­¤Æ│ Payments
item.description: Stripe saved-card setup, default payment method, and test-card helper APIs.

request.description:
Create a Stripe SetupIntent for saved-card registration.

**Returns:** `customerId`, `setupIntentId`, `clientSecret`, and `publishableKey`.

**Flow:** Frontend uses Stripe.js/Elements to confirm the SetupIntent, then calls `POST /payments/default-payment-method` with the confirmed `setupIntentId`.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/payments/setup-intent`

Check whether a Stripe SetupIntent has been confirmed and can be saved as default payment method.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/payments/setup-intent/{{setup_intent_id}}`

Save a confirmed Stripe SetupIntent payment method as the user's default card.

ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ **PCI-safe flow:** Do NOT send raw card numbers. Use Stripe.js/Elements on frontend to confirm the SetupIntent clientSecret, then send the succeeded `setupIntentId` here.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/payments/default-method`
ŌÜĀ’ĖÅ **Development/Test only.** Save a Stripe test card for testing the bidding flow. Only works outside production with a Stripe test secret key. Default test card is `pm_card_visa`.

item.name: ­¤ōä Invoices
item.description: Customer invoice, admin invoice, and pickup QR/code verification APIs.

request.description:
Get invoices for the currently authenticated customer.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/invoices/my`

Admin-only: List all invoices across all customers.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/invoices/all`
Admin-only: Verify an invoice's pickup QR token or alphanumeric pickup code.

item.name: ­¤ÜÜ Pickups
item.description: Pickup slot management, appointment scheduling, and completion APIs.

request.description: Admin-only: Create a new pickup capacity time slot.
List available pickup slots that can be booked.
Admin-only: List all pickup slots including inactive and full ones.
Get paid invoices that are ready for pickup scheduling.

Schedule one or many paid invoices into a single pickup appointment.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/pickups/schedule`

Get pickup appointments for the currently authenticated customer.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/pickups/my-appointments`

Admin-only: List all pickup appointments.

**Alias:** `GET /api/v1/pickups/appointments`
Admin-only: Complete a warehouse handover by appointment ID or pickup code.

Send a public contact message. No authentication required.

**Alias:** `POST /api/v1/contacts/send-message`

item.name: ­¤öö Notifications
item.description: Admin notification listing and read-state APIs.

request.description: Admin-only: List notifications with pagination.

Admin-only: Mark all notifications as read.

**Alias:** `PATCH /api/v1/notifications/read/all`

item.name: ŌÜÖ’ĖÅ Settings
item.description: Platform pickup policy, storage fee, and public settings APIs.

request.description: Admin-only: Get platform pickup/storage settings.
Admin-only: Update pickup deadline, storage fee rules, and forfeiture policies.
Customer-visible pickup policy settings. No authentication required.

item.name: ­¤ōŖ Reports
item.description: Admin revenue, auction, pickup, and inventory analytics APIs.

request.description: Admin-only: Get revenue summary from paid invoices.
Admin-only: Get auction outcome summary.
Admin-only: Get pickup workload summary.
Admin-only: Get inventory status summary.

variable.description: Base URL of the API server (scheme + host + port)
JWT access token. Auto-populated after successful login via test script.
MongoDB ObjectId of a pickup slot
